figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of the proposed self-supervised framework, NARA.
Table 8: Per-type performance for traffic speed prediction. Counts denote the number of test instances per class.
Table 1: Traffic speed prediction: results averaged over 10 independent runs (SD in parentheses). Gains are computed relative to the second-best method. Bold = best, underline = second-best.
Table 2: Building function classification: results averaged over 10 independent runs (SD in parentheses). Gains are computed relative to the second-best method. Bold = best, underline = second-best.
Table 10: Per-category Hit@1 and Hit@5 for next POI prediction (NY-CTLE). Counts denote the number of test instances per type.
